name: Impair Command History Logging Activity Detected
notes: This rule detects impair command history logging activity.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Exploit.Command Execution, Audit.Command Execution Success
when the event matches LOWER("Process Name") == 'powershell.exe' AQL filter query

when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%psreadline%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%consolehost_history.txt%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%set-psreadlineoption -historysavestyle savenothing%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%set-psreadlineoption -historysavepath%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Impair Command History Logging Activity Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Exploit.Command Execution, Audit.Command Execution Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Name") == 'powershell.exe' AQL filter query

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%psreadline%'  OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%consolehost_history.txt%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%set-psreadlineoption -historysavestyle savenothing%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%set-psreadlineoption -historysavepath%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Impair Command History Logging Activity Detected
Event description: Detects impair command history logging activity.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using ProcessName (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
